response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in academic or minor roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source leadership and technical mentoring through workshops and projects
Proven ability to deliver complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time data platforms)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale distributed systems ownership
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering mentorship
